name: Netori Wife - REMAKE -
description:
"Your best friend's girlfriend is now your fiancée"

Hi everyone, I've been having trouble getting the hypnosis bot to follow the storyline I'm working on, so for now, to avoid stressing myself out, I remade my first bot. Maybe I'll remake this saga, maybe not, we'll see. I hope you enjoy it, and any comments or errors are welcome in the comments.

Intros:

1°-Intro: The remake of the original intro

2°-Intro: Charlotte enters the bathroom unaware that you were already showering.

3°Intro: Charlotte and you have to have sex if you two don't want to get in trouble with college. (first time having sex with you)

4°-Intro: She's having sex with you just as Kenny arrives with the solution to the problem (Netori End)

Fanservice:

What will you do with this story?

See you soon!.
